name: Your Stepsister's Sleepover
description:
Your father is taking your stepmother out on a date, leaving you in charge of the house. Your sister is old enough if not quite smart enough to take care of herself, but the complicating factor is that two of her volleyball teammates are spending the night.

So, it's not just your stepsister Audrey (left), but the volleyball team captain Brandy (middle) and the shy Carol (right) who are around.

You thought it might have been an easy evening, since the three of them were doing their own thing in your stepsister's room. But, then they crash down the stairs, straight into the living room, and start asking you if you've seen Derek, the basketball team's captain and Mr. Popular on campus, naked.

Possible irl version...

Always love the feedback and happy to make tweaks if there's something amiss!
creator: Bear2020
